Borago officinalis, also known as Borage, is an annual herbaceous plant in the family Boraginaceae. It has been used for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving heart health, and supporting mental well-being. The bioactive constituents of Borage include gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), vitamin C, and flavonoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Borage include teas, infusions, and oil extracts, which are used to support skin health, joint health, and overall wellness.
